verdict: Blistex Medicated Plus delivers functional lip care with active medicinal ingredients designed to soothe and heal chapped lips. The camphor and menthol provide therapeutic benefits, though the formula leans medicated rather than nourishing.

_research.name: Blistex Medicated Plus Lip Balm
pros: Effective for severely dry or chapped lips
_research.con: Heavy menthol/camphor content may irritate sensitive lips with prolonged use.
